name: pocket-claude
description: Your Claude Code CLI in your pocket. Self-hosted, open-source.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n master,agent -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/master" "npm run dev -w apps/agent"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/protocol && npm run build -w packages/rfs-mcp && npm run build -w apps/agent && npm run build -w apps/master
